verse.name: v1
verse.lines: THROUGH VALLEYS SO WIDE AND DEEP I COULD HAVE LOST MY WAY UP RUGGED MOUNTAINS SO STEEP THEY TOOK MY STRENGTH AWAY AND THROUGH THE TIMES I COULD HAVE BEEN A CASUALTY PRAISE GOD, BY FAITH HE'S BEEN THERE FOR ME

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: OH WHAT A FRIEND, OH WHAT A FRIEND JESUS HAS NEVER FAILED HE'S BEEN THERE FOR ME AND HE HAS TURNED MY HOPE INTO REALITY PRAISE GOD BY FAITH HE'S BEEN THERE FOR ME

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: THERE'S HOPE IN THIS WORLD THRO HIM WHEN FRIEND'S HAVE TURNED AWAY AND WHEN THE MEANS HAVE GROWN SLIM THAT GIVES US STRENGTH EACH DAY I'LL WALK ALONE BY FAITH IN GOD'S SUFFICIENCY PRAISE GOD BY FAITH HE'S BEEN THERE FOR ME
